name: Herbed Tricolor Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 tbsp white wine vinegar, or to taste
1 large red onion, quartered and sliced
3/4 cup finely chopped fresh herbs, basil, dill, etc.
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl whisk together yogurt, mayonnaise, vinegar, parsley, onion, and herbs.
2. Cook pasta until tender, about 12 minutes.
3. Drain pasta and rinse with cold water.
4. Drain and toss with dressing, salt, and pepper to taste.
5. Salad may be made 4 hours ahead and chilled, covered. If pasta absorbs dressing while standing, toss with about 3 tbsp warm water.
